decision-tree.root-question: Is the use case asymmetric (search / RAG with queries vs documents)?

branch.conclusion: Score Voyage / Cohere / OpenAI text-embedding-3-large on the 3 axes.
Score BGE-M3 / e5 / sentence-transformers on the 3 axes.
Score symmetric models (text-embedding-3-small, all-MiniLM) on the 3 axes.

example.p: Score Voyage / Cohere / OpenAI text-embedding-3-large on the 3 axes.
